title: Hieracium subvaldepilosum
taxonomy: Hieracium subvaldepilosum belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Hieracium, which includes over 1,000 species of hawkweeds. The genus Hieracium is typically classified as being in the subfamily Cichorioideae and tribe Senecioneae. Further classification would include its kingdom (Plantae) and other taxonomic ranks.
